name: Ignacio Piñeiro
abstract: Ignacio Piñeiro Martínez (May 21, 1888 – March 12, 1969) was a Cuban musician, bandleader and composer whose career started in rumba and flowered in the rise of the son. He was one of the most important composers of son music; in total he wrote about 327 numbers, mostly sones.

about_quotes.speaker: Frank "Machito" Grillo
about_quotes.evidence: Ignacio Pineiro saw me playing the maracas, so I went - he told me "I want you to go to the Havana Sport, that was the academy, Havana Sport. So I went out there, played maracas hor him and I played about six months.
